subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Thy letter was received and its purport was made plain and evident. Thou hadst written of the high endeavour
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان مکتوب شما رسید و مقصود واضح و پدید شد از همت و جد و جهد
subcodes.subjects: @He Whom God Shall Make Manifest; the Bab and Baha'u'llah, @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar]
